title: EQ - Select a value, disconnect/connect device - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ setting (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom) does not persist after Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with a connected device that supports EQ.
2. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
3. Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or a Custom EQ preset).
4. Disconnect the device from the phone (e.g., turn off Bluetooth or use the device's Power button).
5. Reconnect the device to the phone (e.g., turn on Bluetooth or press the device's Bluetooth button).
6. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
7. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
expected: The selected EQ value (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ) persists after disconnecting and reconnecting the device. This should hold true for all possible EQ values.
